title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
